case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. LUIS DIEGO ORTIZ MAGANA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00) SERVED MAR-20-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAGANA, LUIS DIEGO ORTIZ
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $256.41 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAGANA, LUIS DIEGO ORTIZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
